name: LCD Menu
description: The component provides an infrastructure for setting up a hierarchical menu on character based LCD displays. This offers the user an interactive method to display labels, control entities like `switch`, `select`, `number`  available locally on the ESPHome node, without the requirement of a network connection.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Display ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the LCD display.

config_entries.label: Mark Back
config_entries.description: Code of the character used to mark menu items going back one level. As the character set lacks a good looking back arrow, using a user defined character is advisable (use `8` to reference one at position `0` to avoid problems with zeros in a string). Defaults to `0x5e` (`^`  ).

config_entries.label: Mark Editing
config_entries.description: Code of the character used to mark menu item editing mode. Defaults to `0x2a` (`*`  ).

config_entries.label: Mark Selected
config_entries.description: Code of the character used to mark menu item selected. Defaults to `0x3e` (`>`  ).

config_entries.label: Mark Submenu
config_entries.description: Code of the character used to mark menu item leading to a submenu. Defaults to `0x7e` (a right arrow).
